title: 9 Natural Essential Oils for Runners with Knee Swelling
description: Curcuma longa essential oils, extracted from turmeric roots, contain a powerful compound called curcumin, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This helps to reduce knee swelling by blocking the production of enzymes that cause inflammation, and neutralizing free radicals that damage tissues. The oil also contains other constituents like alpha-pinene, beta-pinene, and borneol, which have analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects.  To use Curcuma longa essential oils for...
